text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O gets injured during training, so
I bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sorry... This is all because I was so careless...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I took notes on how this injury occurred, and I'll
make sure it doesn't happen again...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if they ever have students fill out
questionnaires about how they were injured. I bet
the results would make a good reference.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: All right, let's return to training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm still in a little bit of pain, but it shouldn't
affect my running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I can't simply sit around while others are out
there training!
choice_data_list:
I understand how you feel, but you should still
rest.
Okay. Let's see what you can do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: In other words, patience is a virtue...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I'll rest for today and make sure my
injury heals.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I got myself into this mess, so please don't feel
bad about this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O looks crestfallen as she returns
to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Now it hurts even more...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um... Maybe I should stop after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O looks full of regret as she
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I don't think I can exactly run, but I'll find
some kind of training to do regardless!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Having a positive attitude is the fastest way to
heal injuries! "Running is the best medicine," as
the saying goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we continue training. Mindful of her
injury, Sakura Chiyono O sticks to what she can
do safely.
